2fa_enabled.subject: Security Alert: Two-factor authentication enabled — {{community}}
2fa_enabled.title: Two-Factor Authentication Enabled
2fa_enabled.preview: Two-factor authentication has been enabled on your account
2fa_enabled.body: Two-factor authentication has been enabled on your account. Your account is now more secure.
2fa_enabled.warning: If you did not make this change, please contact support immediately to secure your account.

2fa_disabled.subject: Security Alert: Two-factor authentication disabled — {{community}}
2fa_disabled.title: Two-Factor Authentication Disabled
2fa_disabled.preview: Two-factor authentication has been disabled on your account
2fa_disabled.body: Two-factor authentication has been disabled on your account.
2fa_disabled.warning: If you did not make this change, please contact support immediately as your account may be at risk.

passkey_registered.subject: Security Alert: New passkey registered — {{community}}
passkey_registered.title: New Passkey Registered
passkey_registered.preview: A new passkey has been added to your account
passkey_registered.body: A new passkey has been registered on your {{community}} account.
passkey_registered.warning: If you did not register this passkey, please contact support immediately to secure your account.

passkey_removed.subject: Security Alert: Passkey removed — {{community}}
passkey_removed.title: Passkey Removed
passkey_removed.preview: A passkey has been removed from your account
passkey_removed.body: A passkey has been removed from your {{community}} account.
passkey_removed.warning: If you did not make this change, please contact support immediately to secure your account.

connection_declined.subject: Your connection request was not accepted — {{community}}
connection_declined.title: Connection Request Update
connection_declined.preview: Your connection request to {{name}} was not accepted
connection_declined.body: Your connection request to {{name}} on {{community}} was not accepted at this time.
connection_declined.suggestion: Don't be discouraged — there are many other members in your community to connect with.
